series_metadata.series_description: These files contain branch applications that have been approved, denied, or withdrawn, including any related corporate reports and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years date of application ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years date of application
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
